use_cases: E-commerce product quantity selector with increment/decrement controls
Form input for capturing numeric values with stepper buttons
Inventory or order management systems requiring number input
Settings panels needing precise numeric value adjustment
Any interface requiring controlled numeric input with built-in stepper controls
ai_summary: A minimalist numeric input component with integrated up/down chevron buttons for incrementing and decrementing values. Features a floating label, dark mode support, and custom styled stepper controls that replace default browser number inputs. The component prevents negative values and handles empty state gracefully with a clean, accessible design suitable for e-commerce, SaaS, and fintech applications.
